title: Earnings Call Transcript: Array Technologies Q1 2026 Profitability Soars Amid Revenue Growth
text: Array Technologies Q1 2026 earnings call showed profitability surging amid revenue growth: Adjusted gross margin surged to 30.7%, representing 620 basis point sequential improvement. Adjusted EBITDA jumped 157% sequentially to $28.8 million. Net income swung to positive territory with earnings of $0.06 per share (adjusted), up from prior quarter losses. Margin improvements driven by higher domestic volumes, cost-reduction efforts, and benefits from 45X domestic content tax credit. Company's record $2.4 billion order book supports forward confidence, with 95%+ domestic and 50% from Tier-1 customers. OmniTrack now exceeds DuraTrack in backlog, representing product diversification gains. Management reaffirmed full-year 2026 guidance: Revenue $1.4-$1.5 billion. Adjusted EBITDA $200-$230 million. Adjusted EPS $0.65-$0.75. Q2 expected to show sequential revenue acceleration with guidance of $300-$320 million. Company maintains strong liquidity position with $550 million in total liquidity and 2.7x net debt leverage.
